strengths: Proven TypeScript and fullstack expertise across React, Node.js, REST APIs, and databases—directly matches core tech stack requirements
Demonstrates strong software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) aligned with clean architecture focus
Recent LLM and modern tooling experience (MCP frameworks, AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq) covers nice-to-have technical growth areas
concerns: Significant seniority overqualification (Senior/Staff level for Junior/Mid role) raises flight risk and potential role dissatisfaction
Eight-month unexplained career gap from October 2025 to present creates uncertainty about motivation, stability, and reason for stepping back
Recent technical focus on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators diverges from hands-on fullstack product development this role requires

key_factors.factor: Career gap and role motivation clarity

response.justification: Bogdan possesses strong technical credentials with proven TypeScript, React, and Node.js expertise—all core role requirements. His craftsmanship mindset and recent exposure to AI tooling add value. However, applying Senior/Staff-level experience to a Junior/Mid role signals potential overqualification and flight risk. Combined with an eight-month unexplained career gap and a recent pivot toward infrastructure and AI tooling work rather than transactional fullstack development, there are material questions about role fit and long-term commitment that require clarification.
